metadata.name: ww-input-select
metadata.description: A form-integrated dropdown select component for choosing one or many values from a list of options. Supports static choices or dynamic data binding (with mapping formulas), single or multi-select, optional in-dropdown search with custom search fields, virtual scrolling for large lists, and form validation.
features: Single-select or multi-select modes (via selectType property) with Chip display
Static option arrays or dynamic binding with mapping formulas (label, value, icon, image)
Optional in-dropdown search with configurable searchBy fields and placeholders
Per-option icons, images, and disabled states via mapping formulas
Virtual scrolling and Heavy mode enabled for large datasets (1000+ items)
Form integration with required, customValidation, and validation formulas
Customizable placeholder, search placeholder, and empty-state text
Extensive styling for trigger, dropdown, options, and chips
Use for dropdown/combobox UX or large lists (prefer radio/checkbox for simple inline choices)

properties.name: optionType
properties.description: Visual layout for each option: 'text' shows just the label, 'iconText' adds a leading icon (requires mappingIcon), 'imageText' adds a leading image (requires mappingImage).

properties.name: choices
properties.description: The list of options. Each entry can be a primitive (string/number) or an object. When binding an object collection, use mappingLabel and mappingValue to extract the visible label and the underlying value.

properties.name: mappingLabel
properties.description: Formula to extract the label from each option item. For primitive values use context.mapping directly. For objects use context.mapping?.['label']. Always use 'context.mapping...'.

properties.name: mappingIcon
properties.description: Formula to extract the icon (system icon code) from each option item. Used in Icon + Text mode. Always use 'context.mapping...'. Inactive when optionType is not 'iconText'.

properties.name: mappingImage
properties.description: Formula to extract the image URL from each option item. Used in Image + Text mode. Always use 'context.mapping...'. Inactive when optionType is not 'imageText'.

properties.name: mappingValue
properties.description: Formula to extract the value from each option item. For primitive values use context.mapping directly. For objects use context.mapping?.['value']. Always use 'context.mapping...'.

properties.name: mappingDisabled
properties.description: Formula returning true to disable a specific option (per-row condition). Use to disable items based on data, e.g. `context.mapping?.['outOfStock']`.

properties.name: initValueSingle
properties.description: The initial selected value for single select mode. The format should match the mappingValue logic. For example, if mappingValue targets an id, initValueSingle should be an id.

properties.name: initValueMulti
properties.description: The initial selected values for multiple select mode. An array of values. The format should match the mappingValue logic. For example, if mappingValue targets an id, initValueMulti should be an array of ids.

properties.name: selectType
properties.description: Whether the select allows a single value or multiple values. When 'multiple', the exposed `value` variable is an array.

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Disable the select component, preventing user interaction.

properties.name: required
properties.description: Whether a value must be selected for form validation to pass.

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: When true, the current value is shown but cannot be changed; activates the 'readonly' state.

properties.name: initialState
properties.description: Determines whether the dropdown starts in an open or closed state. Possible values: closed, open.

properties.name: closeOnSelect
properties.description: Close the dropdown automatically after the user picks an option. Common pattern: true for single-select, false for multi-select.

properties.name: manualTrigger
properties.description: If true, the select will not be opened by clicking on the trigger. Use the Toggle action to open and close the select.

properties.name: closeOnClickOutside
properties.description: Whether the select dropdown closes when clicking outside the dropdown.

properties.name: placeholder
properties.description: Text shown in the trigger when no value is selected.

properties.name: emptyStateText
properties.description: Text shown inside the dropdown when no option matches the current search or the choices list is empty.

properties.name: searchPlaceholder
properties.description: Placeholder text shown in the in-dropdown search input. Only relevant when showSearch is true.

properties.name: offsetX
properties.description: The horizontal offset of the dropdown relative to the trigger. A length value like '4px' or '10%'.

properties.name: offsetY
properties.description: The vertical offset of the dropdown relative to the trigger. A length value like '8px' or '10%'.

properties.name: zIndexOpen
properties.description: The z-index of the dropdown when it is open.

properties.name: virtualScrollBuffer
properties.description: The buffer in pixels to add to edges of the scrolling visible area to start rendering items further away.

properties.name: virtualScrollMinItemSize
properties.description: The minimum height of an item in pixels. Used by the dynamic scroller to estimate sizes before items are rendered. Inactive when heavyMode is true.

properties.name: heavyMode
properties.description: Enable heavy mode (RecycleScroller) for better performance with large lists (1000+ items). When enabled, you must specify the exact item size. When disabled, DynamicScroller is used.

properties.name: itemSize
properties.description: The exact height (in pixels) of each option item. All items must have the same height when using heavy mode. Inactive when heavyMode is false.

properties.name: allowScrollingWhenOpen
properties.description: Allow page scrolling when the dropdown is open. Should be disabled in some edge cases like in popups or datagrids.

properties.name: selectOnClick
properties.description: Whether the option should be automatically selected when clicked.

properties.name: unselectOnClick
properties.description: Whether the option should be automatically unselected when clicked if already selected.

properties.name: showSearch
properties.description: Display a search input inside the dropdown to filter options.

properties.name: searchBy
properties.description: Array of object property paths to search against when showSearch is true and choices is a collection of objects. Empty means search by the option label.

properties.name: autoFocus
properties.description: Whether the search input should be focused when the dropdown is opened.

properties.name: fieldName
properties.description: Field name used to identify this select in the parent ww-form-container submission payload.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy).

properties.name: customValidation
properties.description: Enable a custom validation formula in addition to the built-in required check.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy).

properties.name: validation
properties.description: Custom validation formula for this form field. Only used when customValidation is true. Inactive when the element is not in a form container or when customValidation is false.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy) or when customValidation is false.

properties.name: selectedFontFamily
properties.description: Font family for the selected value text (single select mode only). Inactive when selectType is not 'single'.

properties.name: selectedFontSize
properties.description: Font size for the selected value text (single select mode only). Inactive when selectType is not 'single'.

properties.name: selectedFontWeight
properties.description: Font weight for the selected value text (single select mode only). Values: 100-900. Inactive when selectType is not 'single'.

properties.name: selectedFontColor
properties.description: Font color for the selected value text (single select mode only). Inactive when selectType is not 'single'.

properties.name: selectedTextAlign
properties.description: Text alignment for the selected value text (single select mode only). Possible values: left, center, right. Inactive when selectType is not 'single'.

properties.name: placeholderFontFamily
properties.description: Font family for the placeholder text.

properties.name: placeholderFontSize
properties.description: Font size for the placeholder text.

properties.name: placeholderFontWeight
properties.description: Font weight for the placeholder text. Values: 100-900.

properties.name: placeholderFontColor
properties.description: Font color for the placeholder text.

properties.name: placeholderTextAlign
properties.description: Text alignment for the placeholder text (single select mode only). Possible values: left, center, right. Inactive when selectType is not 'single'.

properties.name: chipFontFamily
properties.description: Font family for chip text (multiple select mode only). Inactive when selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipFontSize
properties.description: Font size for chip text (multiple select mode only). Inactive when selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipFontWeight
properties.description: Font weight for chip text (multiple select mode only). Values: 100-900. Inactive when selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipFontColor
properties.description: Font color for chip text (multiple select mode only). Inactive when selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipPadding
properties.description: Padding for chips (multiple select mode only). Inactive when selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipBgColor
properties.description: Background color for chips (multiple select mode only). Inactive when selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipBorder
properties.description: Border mode for chips (multiple select mode only). false = single border applied via chipBorderAll, true = split borders applied via chipBorderTop/Right/Bottom/Left. Inactive when selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipBorderAll
properties.description: Border style for chips (when not using split borders, multiple select mode only). Inactive when chipBorder is true or selectType is 'single'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when chipBorder is true or selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipBorderTop
properties.description: Top border style for chips (split-border mode, multiple select only). Inactive when chipBorder is false or selectType is 'single'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when chipBorder is false or selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipBorderRight
properties.description: Right border style for chips (split-border mode, multiple select only). Inactive when chipBorder is false or selectType is 'single'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when chipBorder is false or selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipBorderBottom
properties.description: Bottom border style for chips (split-border mode, multiple select only). Inactive when chipBorder is false or selectType is 'single'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when chipBorder is false or selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipBorderLeft
properties.description: Left border style for chips (split-border mode, multiple select only). Inactive when chipBorder is false or selectType is 'single'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when chipBorder is false or selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipBorderRadius
properties.description: Border radius for chips (multiple select mode only). Inactive when selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipIconUnselect
properties.description: System icon code for the unselect icon on chips (multiple select mode only). Inactive when selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipIconColor
properties.description: Color of the unselect icon on chips (multiple select mode only). Inactive when selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipIconSize
properties.description: Size of the unselect icon on chips (multiple select mode only). Inactive when selectType is 'single'.

properties.name: chipImageSize
properties.description: Size of the image in chips (multiple select + Image+Text mode only). Inactive when selectType is 'single' or optionType is not 'imageText'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when selectType is 'single' or optionType is not 'imageText'.

properties.name: chipImageRadius
properties.description: Border radius of the image in chips (multiple select + Image+Text mode only). Inactive when selectType is 'single' or optionType is not 'imageText'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when selectType is 'single' or optionType is not 'imageText'.

properties.name: triggerHeight
properties.description: Height of the trigger element. For multiple select, set to 'unset' to allow height to adjust based on chip count.

properties.name: triggerBorder
properties.description: Border mode for the trigger. false = single border applied via triggerBorderAll, true = split borders applied via triggerBorderTop/Right/Bottom/Left.

properties.name: triggerBorderAll
properties.description: Border style for the trigger element (when not using split borders). Inactive when triggerBorder is true.

properties.name: triggerBorderTop
properties.description: Top border style for the trigger element (split-border mode). Inactive when triggerBorder is false.

properties.name: triggerBorderRight
properties.description: Right border style for the trigger element (split-border mode). Inactive when triggerBorder is false.

properties.name: triggerBorderBottom
properties.description: Bottom border style for the trigger element (split-border mode). Inactive when triggerBorder is false.

properties.name: triggerBorderLeft
properties.description: Left border style for the trigger element (split-border mode). Inactive when triggerBorder is false.

properties.name: triggerBorderRadius
properties.description: Border radius of the trigger element.

properties.name: triggerBgColor
properties.description: Background color of the trigger element.

properties.name: triggerShadows
properties.description: Box shadow for the trigger element.

properties.name: triggerPadding
properties.description: Padding for the trigger element.

properties.name: triggerMargin
properties.description: Margin for the trigger element.

properties.name: triggerIconOpen
properties.description: System icon code displayed when the dropdown is open.

properties.name: triggerIconClose
properties.description: System icon code displayed when the dropdown is closed.

properties.name: triggerIconColor
properties.description: Color of the trigger icon.

properties.name: triggerIconSize
properties.description: Size of the trigger icon.

properties.name: triggerImageSize
properties.description: Size of the image in the trigger (single select + Image+Text mode only). Inactive when selectType is 'multiple' or optionType is not 'imageText'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when selectType is 'multiple' or optionType is not 'imageText'.

properties.name: triggerImageRadius
properties.description: Border radius of the image in the trigger (single select + Image+Text mode only). Inactive when selectType is 'multiple' or optionType is not 'imageText'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when selectType is 'multiple' or optionType is not 'imageText'.

properties.name: dropdownWidth
properties.description: Width of the dropdown. By default matches the trigger width.

properties.name: dropdownMaxHeight
properties.description: Maximum height of the dropdown. Required for heavy mode. A default of 500px is applied when there are many options and no max-height is set.

properties.name: dropdownBorder
properties.description: Border mode for the dropdown. false = single border applied via dropdownBorderAll, true = split borders applied via dropdownBorderTop/Right/Bottom/Left.

properties.name: dropdownBorderAll
properties.description: Border style for the dropdown (when not using split borders). Inactive when dropdownBorder is true.

properties.name: dropdownBorderTop
properties.description: Top border style for the dropdown (split-border mode). Inactive when dropdownBorder is false.

properties.name: dropdownBorderRight
properties.description: Right border style for the dropdown (split-border mode). Inactive when dropdownBorder is false.

properties.name: dropdownBorderBottom
properties.description: Bottom border style for the dropdown (split-border mode). Inactive when dropdownBorder is false.

properties.name: dropdownBorderLeft
properties.description: Left border style for the dropdown (split-border mode). Inactive when dropdownBorder is false.

properties.name: dropdownBorderRadius
properties.description: Border radius of the dropdown.

properties.name: dropdownBgColor
properties.description: Background color of the dropdown.

properties.name: dropdownShadows
properties.description: Box shadow for the dropdown.

properties.name: dropdownPadding
properties.description: Padding for the dropdown.

properties.name: optionFontFamily
properties.description: Font family for option text in the dropdown.

properties.name: optionFontSize
properties.description: Font size for option text in the dropdown.

properties.name: optionFontWeight
properties.description: Font weight for option text in the dropdown. Values: 100-900.

properties.name: optionFontColor
properties.description: Text color for options in the dropdown.

properties.name: optionSpacing
properties.description: Spacing between options in the dropdown.

properties.name: optionPadding
properties.description: Padding for each option in the dropdown.

properties.name: optionBorder
properties.description: Border style for each option in the dropdown.

properties.name: optionBorderRadius
properties.description: Border radius for each option in the dropdown.

properties.name: optionBgColor
properties.description: Background color for options in the dropdown.

properties.name: optionBgColorFocused
properties.description: Background color for the focused option in the dropdown.

properties.name: optionBgColorHover
properties.description: Background color when hovering over an option in the dropdown.

properties.name: optionCursor
properties.description: Cursor style when hovering over options.

properties.name: optionIcon
properties.description: System icon code for the checked/selected icon on options.

properties.name: optionIconColor
properties.description: Color of the checked/selected icon on options.

properties.name: optionIconSize
properties.description: Size of the checked/selected icon on options.

properties.name: optionImageSize
properties.description: Size of the image in options (Image+Text mode only). Inactive when optionType is not 'imageText'.

properties.name: optionImageRadius
properties.description: Border radius of the image in options (Image+Text mode only). Inactive when optionType is not 'imageText'.

properties.name: emptyStateFontFamily
properties.description: Font family for the empty state text.

properties.name: emptyStateFontSize
properties.description: Font size for the empty state text.

properties.name: emptyStateFontWeight
properties.description: Font weight for the empty state text. Values: 100-900.

properties.name: emptyStateFontColor
properties.description: Text color for the empty state text.

properties.name: emptyStatePadding
properties.description: Padding for the empty state text.

properties.name: emptyStateTextAlign
properties.description: Text alignment for the empty state. Possible values: left, center, right.

properties.name: searchWidth
properties.description: Width of the search input. Inactive when showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchHeight
properties.description: Height of the search input. Inactive when showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchBorder
properties.description: Border mode for the search input. false = single border applied via searchBorderAll, true = split borders applied via searchBorderTop/Right/Bottom/Left. Inactive when showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchBorderAll
properties.description: Border style for the search input (when not using split borders). Inactive when searchBorder is true or showSearch is false.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when searchBorder is true or showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchBorderTop
properties.description: Top border style for the search input (split-border mode). Inactive when searchBorder is false or showSearch is false.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when searchBorder is false or showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchBorderRight
properties.description: Right border style for the search input (split-border mode). Inactive when searchBorder is false or showSearch is false.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when searchBorder is false or showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchBorderBottom
properties.description: Bottom border style for the search input (split-border mode). Inactive when searchBorder is false or showSearch is false.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when searchBorder is false or showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchBorderLeft
properties.description: Left border style for the search input (split-border mode). Inactive when searchBorder is false or showSearch is false.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when searchBorder is false or showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchBorderRadius
properties.description: Border radius of the search input. Inactive when showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchPadding
properties.description: Padding for the search input. Inactive when showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchMargin
properties.description: Margin for the search input. Inactive when showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchOutline
properties.description: Outline style for the search input. Inactive when showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchOutlineOffset
properties.description: Outline offset for the search input. Inactive when showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchFontFamily
properties.description: Font family for the search input text. Inactive when showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchFontSize
properties.description: Font size for the search input text. Inactive when showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchFontWeight
properties.description: Font weight for the search input text. Values: 100-900. Inactive when showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchFontColor
properties.description: Font color for the search input text. Inactive when showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchBgColor
properties.description: Background color of the search input. Inactive when showSearch is false.

properties.name: searchPlaceholderColor
properties.description: Color of the search input placeholder text. Inactive when showSearch is false.

states.name: focus
states.description: Applied when the trigger element is focused (keyboard navigation or click).

states.name: readonly
states.description: Applied when the readonly property is true.

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when the selected value changes (user picks an option, removes a chip, or an action mutates the value).

events.name: initValueChange
events.description: Triggered when the initial value property (initValueSingle / initValueMulti) changes programmatically.

events.name: focus
events.description: Triggered when the trigger element receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Triggered when the trigger element loses focus (and focus did not move to an option).

localContext.description: Array of all available options after mapping. Each entry is `{ value, label, disabled, isSelected, data }`.
localContext.content: Array of objects equivalent to the choices property

localContext.description: Current selected value (single) or array of values (multiple).
localContext.content: The current selected value (single) or array of values (multiple).

localContext.description: Full option object(s) corresponding to the current selection — useful to read other fields than the value.
localContext.content: The full option object(s) corresponding to the current selection — useful to read other fields than the value.
The type of the select (single or multiple).

localContext.description: Whether the dropdown is currently open.
localContext.content: Whether the dropdown is currently open.

localContext.description: Pixel width of the trigger element — useful to size the dropdown.
localContext.content: The pixel width of the trigger element.

localContext.description: Pixel height of the trigger element.
localContext.content: The pixel height of the trigger element.

localContext.description: Current search input text. Only present when showSearch is true.
Resolved searchBy field list. Only present when showSearch is true.
Subset of options matching the current search query. Only present when showSearch is true.
localContext.content: The subset of options matching the current search query.

localContext.description: Placeholder text for the select trigger.
localContext.content: The placeholder text for the select trigger.

actions.label: Update value
actions.description: Set the selected value(s). For single, pass a single value; for multiple, pass an array.

actions.label: Reset value
actions.description: Reset the selection back to the configured initial value.

actions.label: Remove specific value
actions.description: Remove a single value from the current selection. Multi-select only.

actions.label: Focus input
actions.description: Move focus to the trigger element.

slots.name: trigger
slots.description: Custom trigger element for the select dropdown

slots.name: optionElement
slots.description: Custom element for each option in the dropdown

slots.name: selectedElement
slots.description: Custom element for selected value display

slots.name: chipElement
slots.description: Custom element for chips in multi-select mode

slots.name: noResultElement
slots.description: Custom element displayed when no search results found

variables.name: value
variables.description: Current selection — a single value when selectType is 'single', an array of values when selectType is 'multiple'.

specifications: Use inside a ww-form-container and set fieldName so the value is collected on submit. Do not store the value in a separate variable — bind directly to the exposed `value` variable.

When choices is bound to an object collection, set mappingLabel and mappingValue formulas to point at the right keys. When choices is a primitive array (or an array of {label,value} objects matching the defaults), leave the mappings at their defaults.
Use specific fields for mapping formulas (e.g. context.mapping?.['id']).
Labels are text-only - never return HTML in mappingLabel.
Set selectType to 'multiple' for multi-select; the exposed `value` becomes an array and the trigger renders chips.
For multiselect, set triggerHeight to 'unset' for dynamic height.

Use ww-input-radio for visible single-choice with up to ~5 options, and ww-input-checkbox for a single boolean. Only use ww-input-select for dropdown/combobox UX or when there are too many options to display inline.
Enable showSearch and provide searchBy when option count is large or when the user needs to filter on fields other than the visible label.
optionType must match the available mapping: 'iconText' requires mappingIcon, 'imageText' requires mappingImage. Leave optionType at 'text' if no icon/image is needed.
Use heavyMode for optimal performance with 1000+ items.
To customize the style of the select trigger (that should looks like a button, or input when the dropdown is closed), use all the properties starting with 'trigger'.
